lines.left: Use: Increases Intellect by 25 for 1 hour.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 60% for 14 sec.  100 charges.
Use: Increases Agility by 25 for 1 hour.
Use: Gives you a dream vision that lets you explore areas that are too dangerous to explore in person.
Use: Increases your Strength by 25 for 1 hour.
Use: Increases attack power by 265 against demons.  Lasts 5 min.
Use: Shows the location of all nearby demons on the minimap for 1 hour.
Use: Increases spell shadow damage by up to 40 for 1 hour.
"Caked grime obscures the true identity of this object."
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand blue stars.
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand green stars.
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand red stars.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 10 of the target's armor.
Chance on hit: Strikes an enemy with the rage of Sul'thraze. Lowers target's physical damage by 3% and deals 90 to 210 Shadow damage with an additional 125 damage over 15 sec.
Equip: Increases your chance to parry an attack by 1%.
Chance on hit: Hurls a fiery ball that causes 40 Fire damage and an additional 9 damage over 6 sec.
Equip: Increases healing done by spells and effects by up to 22.
Use: Charge an enemy, knocking it silly for 30 seconds. Also knocks you down, stunning you for a short period of time. Any damage caused will revive the target.
Equip: Allows 5% of your Mana regeneration to continue while casting.
Use: Reduces your fall speed for 10 sec.
Equip: Allows 5% of your Mana regeneration to continue while casting.
Equip: Chance to strike your ranged target with a Fire Blast for 12 to 18 Fire damage.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 2%.
Chance on hit: Increases damage by 10 for 8 sec.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 80 to 112 Fire damage.
Chance on hit: Increases your attack speed by 30% for 10 sec.
Chance on hit: Delivers a fatal wound for 250 to 350 damage.
Equip: Increases healing done by spells and effects by up to 22.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 21.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 10 to 20 Nature damage.
Use: Energize the weapon, making it swing 20% faster for 30 sec.
Chance on hit: Deals 5 Nature damage every 5 sec to any enemy in an 8 yard radius around the caster for 15 sec.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 5.
Equip: When struck in combat has a 5% chance of inflicting 35 to 65 Nature damage to the attacker.
Chance on hit: Punctures target's armor lowering it by 100.
Chance on hit: Surrounds you with electricity, dealing 15 Nature damage to any who strike you for 15 sec.
Equip: Increases damage done by Nature spells and effects by up to 14.
Equip: Adds 3 Lightning damage to your melee attacks.
Equip: Increases damage done by Shadow spells and effects by up to 14.
Equip: 3% of damage dealt is returned as healing.
Equip: Allows 5% of your Mana regeneration to continue while casting.
Chance on hit: Delivers a fatal wound for 160 to 180 damage.

Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 23.
Chance on hit: Punctures target's armor lowering it by 100.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 80 to 100 Nature damage.
Use: Channels a bolt of lightning and hurls it towards all enemies in front of the caster causing 147 to 167 Nature damage. The caster is then surrounded by a barrier of electricity for 10 min.
"A simple cloak worn by novice spellcasters of the Defias Brotherhood."
Chance on hit: Wounds the target for 60 to 70 damage.
Chance on hit: Disarm target's weapon for 5 sec.
Chance on hit: Blasts nearby enemies with thunder increasing the time between their attacks by 11% for 10 sec and doing 7 Nature damage to them.  Will affect up to 4 targets.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 91 to 125 Nature damage.

"Green mists swirl inside the lattices of this gem."
Use: Poisons all enemies in an 8 yard radius around the caster.  Victims of the poison suffer 50 Nature damage every 5 sec for 45 sec.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 21.
Use: Inflicts 213 to 287 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Inflicts 149 to 201 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 8 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Reduces your fall speed for 10 sec.
Use: Absorbs 300 to 500 Fire damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 5.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 7.
Use: Inflicts 255 to 345 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 3 yard radius for 3 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Equip: Chance to strike your ranged target with a Quill Shot for 66 to 98 Nature damage.
Equip: Increases damage done by Frost spells and effects by up to 10.
Use: Activates your Mithril Mechanical Dragonling to fight for you for 1 min.  It requires an hour to cool down before it can be used again.
Use: Inflicts 383 to 517 Fire damage and stuns the targets in a 5 yard radius for 3 sec.
Use: Adds a toy to the player's toy collection.
Use: Inflicts 340 to 460 Fire damage and stuns targets for 5 sec in a 10 yard radius.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Creates a mobile bomb that charges the nearest enemy and explodes for 315 to 385 fire damage.
Use: Charge an enemy, knocking it silly for 30 seconds. Also knocks you down, stunning you for a short period of time. Any damage caused will revive the target.
Use: Slightly increases your stealth detection for 10 min.
Chance on hit: Launches a bolt of frost at the enemy causing 20 to 30 Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.
Chance on hit: Reduces threat level on all enemies by a small amount for 10 sec.
Chance on hit: Increases damage done by 20 and attack speed by 5% for 15 sec.
Chance on hit: Stuns target for 3 sec.
Chance on hit: Delivers a fatal wound for 160 damage.
Use: Teaches you how to make Goblin Rocket Fuel.
"Used by Goblin Engineers to power their creations"
Requires Firebloom, Volatile Rum, Leaded Vial
Use: The devices charges over time using your life force and then directs a burst of energy at your opponent.
"Death or Serious Injury may result from use of this device."
Use: Explodes when triggered dealing 450 to 750 Fire damage to all enemies nearby and 375 to 625 damage to you.
Use: Use to fill the Egg of Hakkar.
Use: Teaches you how to make an Inlaid Mithril Cylinder.  This item is used by Gnomish Engineers.
"Used by Gnomish Engineers to reinforce their creations"
Requires Mithril Bar (5), Gold Bar, Truesilver Bar
Use: Shrinks the target reducing their attack power by 250.  Thats what it usually does anyway.....
Use: Captures the target in a net for 10 sec.  The net has a lot of hooks however and sometimes gets caught in the user's clothing when fired......
Use: A shield of force protects you from the next 500 damage done over the next 10 min. WARNING:  Force Field may overload when struck temporarily removing the wearer from this dimension.
Use: These boots significantly increase your run speed for 20 sec.  WARNING:  Their power supply and gyros do not always function as intended.
Use: Creates a Battle Chicken that will fight for you for 1.50 min or until it is destroyed.
Use: Engage in mental combat with a humanoid target to try and control their mind.  If all works well, you will control the mind of the target for 20 sec .....
Use: Deals 61 to 69 fire damage for 10 sec to all targets in a cone in front of the engineer using the weapon.   That is unless it explodes.....
Chance on hit: Launches a bolt of frost at the enemy causing 20 to 30 Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.
Equip: Improves your chance to hit with spells by 1%.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike with spells by 1%.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 24.
Equip: Improves your chance to hit with spells by 1%.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 8.
Equip: Allows 5% of your Mana regeneration to continue while casting.
Chance on hit: Wounds the target causing them to bleed for 70 damage over 30 sec.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 9.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 7.
Chance on hit: Hurls a fiery ball that causes 70 Fire damage and an additional 9 damage over 6 sec.
Chance on hit: Corrupts the target, causing 90 damage over 3 sec.
Chance on hit: Steals 30 life from target enemy.
Equip: +30 Attack Power when fighting Undead.
Use: Use within the Sanctum of the Fallen God.
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Hopes that someday it can grow up to destroy villages, just like mommy."
Equip: Improves your chance to hit by 1%.
Use: Restores 1344 mana over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while drinking.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 18.
Equip: Increases your chance to dodge an attack by 2%.
Chance on hit: Calls forth an Emerald Dragon Whelp to protect you in battle for a short period of time.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 5% for 15 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  60 charges.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 75 for 15 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  75 charges.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 105 for 15 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  90 charges.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 135 for 15 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.
Use: Turn three lesser magic essences into a greater one.
Use: Turn a greater magic essence into three lesser ones.
Use: Turn three lesser astral essences into a greater one.
"Etched into the face of the hammer are the letters: F.F.F."
"Master Key to the Depths, Courtesy of F.F.F."
Use: Turn a greater astral essence into three lesser ones.
Use: Combines Jang'thraze and Sang'thraze to form the mighty sword, Sul'thraze.
Chance on hit: Shields the wielder from physical damage, absorbing 55 to 85 damage. Lasts 20 sec.
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Don't call this bird chicken unless you want egg on your face."
Chance on hit: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy causing 25 Shadow damage.
"Runes filled with liquid fire dance across the tablet."
Use: Turn three lesser mystic essences into a greater one.
Use: Turn a greater mystic essence into three lesser ones.
"Various runes and etchings cover the surface of the key."
Use: Turn three lesser nether essences into a greater one.
Use: Turn a greater nether essence into three lesser ones.
Use: Use on the Dark Coffer in the Black Vault.
Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a weapon to regularly blast its target with fire.
"The dark, pale skin feels like clay."
Equip: Has a 2% chance when struck in combat of protecting you with a holy shield.
Equip: Increases damage done by Fire spells and effects by up to 14.
Use: Throw near a patron of the Grim Guzzler
Races: Human, Dwarf, Night Elf, Gnome, High Elf
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"These adorable critters love snuggling with their owners after a long day of brutal, bloody battle."
Use: Heals the target of 670 damage over 15 sec.
Use: Increases the target's Spirit by 30 for 30 min.
Use: Increases the target's Armor by 200 for 30 min.
Use: Decreases an enemy target's Armor by 200 for 2 min.
Use: Inflicts 383 to 517 fire damage to targets in a 3 yard radius.
Use: A crystal shield surrounds the friendly target, doing 12 damage to anyone who hits him.  Lasts 10 min.
Use: Restores 700 health to a friendly mechanical target

Chance on hit: Reduces targets armor by 300 for 20 sec.
Chance on hit: Stuns target for 8 sec.
Use: Teaches you how to make a Dark Iron Pulverizer.

Requires Dark Iron Bar (18), Heart of Fire (4)
